---
title: "home"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/grimmjulian
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/grimmjulian225

---

I am Julian, and I want to talk about R, Nix and Developer Experience.
